steps.title: Spot the cause of Izquierdo's obscurity
steps.content: The passage explicitly identifies the reason: “One reason for Izquierdo's relative obscurity is the enormous popularity of some of her peers”—specifically Kahlo and Rivera, whose dominance has captivated US audiences and caused Izquierdo to be overlooked.

steps.title: Match the explanation
steps.content: Choice A directly restates this: Izquierdo is not well-known in the US because Kahlo and Rivera draw so much public attention. The other three either reverse the relationship (B), invent unmentioned stylistic or subject-matter details (C), or misattribute the cause to limited artistic output rather than competitive prominence (D). That matches choice A — A is correct.
